stocks.name: Microsoft Corporation
stocks.reason: Market leader in enterprise software and cloud computing; driving massive AI infrastructure growth via Azure and strategic partnerships.

stocks.name: Apple Inc.
stocks.reason: Extremely robust balance sheet and cash flow; strong consumer loyalty with upcoming high-margin foldables and AI-driven hardware product cycles.

stocks.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
stocks.reason: The strongest global bank; recently passed the Federal Reserve stress test with a solid tier 1 capital ratio and initiated a major buyback program.

stocks.name: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated
stocks.reason: Dominant player in US healthcare insurance and services with highly stable operating cash flows and strong secular tailwinds.

stocks.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
stocks.reason: E-commerce and cloud computing dominant player with fast-growing, high-margin advertising revenue and strategic satellite internet initiatives.

stocks.name: Alphabet Inc.
stocks.reason: Dominant digital advertising ecosystem; expanding Google Cloud segment showing solid AI monetization and strong structural free cash flow.

stocks.name: Exxon Mobil Corporation
stocks.reason: Leading integrated energy giant with record production in low-cost basins like Permian and Guyana, demonstrating immense free cash flow generation.

stocks.name: Amgen Inc.
stocks.reason: Biopharma giant with highly resilient cash flows, strong defense of its current blockbuster portfolio, and solid obesity pipeline catalysts.

stocks.name: Lockheed Martin Corporation
stocks.reason: Premier aerospace and defense contractor with highly predictable government backlogs and excellent dividend growth history.

stocks.name: Intuitive Surgical, Inc.
stocks.reason: Undisputed leader in robotic-assisted surgery; high recurring revenue from instruments and accessories driven by double-digit procedure growth.

socialTrends.name: GameStop Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Retail discussion focuses heavily on options volume, liquidity dynamics, and community support despite broader tech sector pullbacks.

socialTrends.name: Tesla, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Active retail debates on Q2 vehicle delivery figures, margin pressures from pricing strategies, and anticipation of the upcoming Robotaxi event.

socialTrends.name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: High retail enthusiasm following its official addition to the Nasdaq-100 index and discussion around its record $2.2 billion backlog.

socialTrends.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Continued retail chatter surrounding massive enterprise adoption of its AIP platform and its expanding strategic partnership with Nvidia.

socialTrends.name: AST SpaceMobile, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Discussion centers on satellite-to-cellular tech milestones, strategic carrier partnerships, and commercial launch timeline catalysts.
